# quant-qmt-proxy

> A FastAPI + gRPC + WebSocket proxy service for the xtquant (国金 QMT) quantitative trading SDK.
> Wraps xtquant market data and trading functions into REST, gRPC, and WebSocket interfaces.

## Documentation Index

- /llms/llms.txt        — This file. Project overview and quick-start guide.
- /llms/api.txt         — Full REST API reference (all endpoints, parameters, responses).
- /llms/data.txt        — Market data module: subscriptions, K-line, tick, L2, downloads.
- /llms/trading.txt     — Trading module: connect, order, cancel, query positions/assets.

Optional detail pages:
- /llms/websocket.txt   — WebSocket protocol for real-time quote streaming.
- /llms/grpc.txt        — gRPC service definitions and usage examples.

Official references:
- Swagger UI:   http://{HOST}/docs
- ReDoc:        http://{HOST}/redoc
- QMT docs:     https://dict.thinktrader.net/nativeApi/start_now.html
- Source repo:  https://github.com/liqimore/quant-qmt-proxy

---

## Project Overview

`quant-qmt-proxy` is a multi-protocol proxy that exposes the `xtquant` Python SDK (bundled with 国金证券 QMT) as network services, enabling any language/platform to access A-share market data and execute trades.

Key capabilities:
- REST API  — HTTP/JSON, auto-generated Swagger docs, API-Key auth
- gRPC      — Binary protocol, streaming subscriptions, low latency
- WebSocket — Real-time quote push with heartbeat support
- Three modes: `mock` (no QMT needed), `dev` (real data, no trade), `prod` (real trading)

## Directory Structure

```
quant-qmt-proxy/
├── app/
│   ├── main.py                 # FastAPI entry point, route registration
│   ├── grpc_server.py          # gRPC server startup
│   ├── config.py               # Settings (YAML + env var APP_MODE)
│   ├── dependencies.py         # Singleton service injection
│   ├── models/
│   │   ├── data_models.py      # Pydantic models for market data
│   │   └── trading_models.py   # Pydantic models for trading
│   ├── routers/
│   │   ├── data.py             # Market data REST routes (/api/v1/data/)
│   │   ├── trading.py          # Trading REST routes (/api/v1/trading/)
│   │   ├── health.py           # Health check routes (/health/)
│   │   ├── websocket.py        # WebSocket routes (/ws/)
│   │   └── llms.py             # LLMs doc routes (/llms/)
│   ├── grpc_services/          # gRPC service implementations
│   └── services/
│       ├── data_service.py     # xtdata wrapper
│       ├── trading_service.py  # xttrader wrapper
│       └── subscription_manager.py  # Quote subscription manager
├── proto/                      # .proto definitions
├── generated/                  # Generated protobuf Python stubs
├── doc/quant-qmt-proxy/llms/   # This LLMs documentation directory
├── config.yml                  # Unified configuration file
└── requirements.txt
```

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites
- Python 3.10+
- 国金 QMT client running (dev/prod mode only)
- Windows OS (QMT is Windows-only)

### Install
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

### Start Service
```powershell
# mock mode — no QMT needed, uses simulated data
$env:APP_MODE="mock"; python run.py

# dev mode — real market data, trading intercepted (default)
$env:APP_MODE="dev"; python run.py

# prod mode — real market data + real trading
$env:APP_MODE="prod"; python run.py
```

Service endpoints after startup:

| Service        | URL                           |
|----------------|-------------------------------|
| REST API       | http://{HOST}                 |
| gRPC           | {HOST_GRPC}                   |
| Swagger UI     | http://{HOST}/docs            |
| ReDoc          | http://{HOST}/redoc           |
| Health Check   | http://{HOST}/health/         |
| WebSocket Test | http://{HOST}/ws/test         |
| LLMs Docs      | http://{HOST}/llms/           |

### Authentication
All API endpoints require an API Key in the request header:
```
X-API-Key: your-api-key
```
Dev mode default keys: `dev-api-key-001`, `dev-api-key-002` (set in `config.yml`).

## Running Modes

| Mode   | Connect xtquant | Real Trading | Use Case                        |
|--------|-----------------|--------------|----------------------------------|
| mock   | No              | No           | Frontend dev, API testing        |
| dev    | Yes             | No (blocked) | Strategy dev, real data no trade |
| prod   | Yes             | Yes          | Live trading                     |

Mode is set via environment variable `APP_MODE` (default: `dev`).
